Mini Retractor Hardware Features & Display Applications

Our Mini Retractor Hardware provides a compact, professional solution for portable banner displays. This lightweight aluminum base system is designed for easy transport and quick setup at trade shows, retail locations, and promotional events.

Hardware Specifications

  • Aluminum Base: Durable lightweight construction for long-lasting use
  • Compact Storage: Shock cord pole folds down into base for easy transport
  • Professional Display: Clean, stable platform for banner presentations
  • Portable Design: Weighs only 1.5lbs for effortless mobility

Product Dimensions

  • Display Size: 9.38" W x 17.5" D x 4" H
  • Weight: 1.5 pounds
  • Storage: Collapsible design for compact transport

Note: Banner not included with hardware purchase. This hardware is designed to work with compatible mini retractor banner systems.

Mini Retractor Hardware Construction Materials

Aluminum Base Construction

Our mini retractor hardware features a precision-engineered aluminum base that provides:

  • Lightweight Performance: At only 1.5lbs, easy to transport and set up
  • Corrosion Resistance: Aluminum construction resists rust and weathering
  • Professional Finish: Clean, polished appearance for business environments
  • Structural Integrity: Stable base design supports banner displays securely

Shock Cord Pole System

The collapsible pole mechanism includes:

  • Shock Cord Technology: Self-tensioning system for quick assembly
  • Compact Storage: Pole sections fold into base completely
  • Smooth Operation: Easy extension and retraction mechanism
  • Reliable Connection: Secure pole-to-base mounting system

Mini Retractor Hardware Setup & Assembly Options

Standard Hardware Configuration

Your mini retractor hardware includes all necessary components for immediate use:

  • Complete Base Unit: Fully assembled aluminum base with integrated storage
  • Collapsible Pole System: Shock cord pole with all connection hardware
  • Professional Finish: Factory-applied protective coating
  • Ready-to-Use Design: No additional assembly required upon delivery

Setup Instructions

Simple three-step setup process:

  1. Remove Pole: Extract shock cord pole from base storage compartment
  2. Extend Pole: Allow shock cord to tension and connect pole sections
  3. Attach Banner: Mount your compatible mini retractor banner system

Storage & Transport

  • Compact Design: Pole retracts completely into base for storage
  • Portable Size: Fits easily in vehicle or storage areas
  • Protective Storage: Base protects pole components during transport

Mini Retractor Hardware Compatibility & Banner Requirements

Hardware Compatibility

This mini retractor hardware is designed to work with compatible banner systems:

  • Banner Mounting: Compatible with standard mini retractor banner cassettes
  • Display Dimensions: Supports banners sized for mini retractor format
  • Connection System: Standard mounting mechanism for universal compatibility
  • Height Adjustment: Telescoping pole accommodates various banner heights

Banner Requirements

When ordering banners to work with this hardware:

  • Material Specifications: Use banner materials compatible with retractor mechanisms
  • Size Guidelines: Banner dimensions must match mini retractor specifications
  • Finishing Requirements: Proper banner finishing for retractor mounting
  • Design Considerations: Account for portable display viewing angles

Setup Guidelines

  • Level Surface: Place hardware on stable, level surface for best display
  • Banner Alignment: Ensure banner cassette properly aligns with hardware
  • Pole Extension: Fully extend pole for optimal banner tension
  • Safety Check: Verify all connections secure before display use

Important Note: This hardware order includes only the base and pole system. Compatible retractor banners must be ordered separately.

Mini Retractor Hardware Questions & Answers

What's included with the mini retractor hardware?

Your order includes the complete hardware system: aluminum base, collapsible shock cord pole, and all mounting components. Banner not included - banners must be ordered separately.

How much does the mini retractor hardware weigh?

The complete hardware system weighs only 1.5 pounds, making it extremely portable for trade shows, meetings, and mobile display applications.

What are the dimensions of the hardware?

The hardware measures 9.38" W x 17.5" D x 4" H when set up. The shock cord pole collapses completely into the base for compact storage and transport.

Do I need tools to assemble the hardware?

No tools required. The shock cord pole extends automatically and locks into position. Simply remove the pole from the base storage compartment and allow it to extend.

What banners work with this hardware?

This hardware is designed for standard mini retractor banner cassettes. The banner must be specifically designed for mini retractor systems to mount properly.

Can I order banners and hardware together?

Yes, you can add compatible mini retractor banners to your order. Browse our mini retractor banner options or contact customer service for assistance with complete display packages.

How long does production take for hardware orders?

We offer flexible production times: 2 business days express, 3 business days standard (most popular), or 5 business days saver. Choose the option that best fits your timeline and budget.

Is the aluminum hardware suitable for outdoor use?

The aluminum construction resists corrosion, but this hardware is primarily designed for indoor use at trade shows, offices, and retail locations. For outdoor displays, consider our outdoor banner hardware options.
